yaml.title: The Burning Strait
yaml.subtitle: A systems view of chokepoint activation, supply chain propagation, and the asymmetric geography of oil dependence
yaml.description: The Strait of Hormuz sits at the centre of the global energy system, where geography, politics, and shipping lanes converge. This article examines why a narrow passage of water can shape oil markets and geopolitical stability.

markdown.headingText: Preface: From Theoretical Risk to Operational Reality

language.appendix-attribution-cite-as: For attribution, please cite this work as:
